use_cases: Form checkbox selection for user input and data collection
Toggle settings and feature switches in application interfaces
Agreement and terms acceptance in sign-up or checkout flows
Filter and selection controls in data tables or lists
Enable or disable options in settings panels
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based checkbox primitive component styled with Tailwind CSS, providing an accessible checkbox input with focus-visible outlines, disabled states, and checked state indicators using the Lucide Check icon. This atomic component serves as a foundational form control for any web application requiring boolean selection or toggle functionality.
